name: kaola-workflow-gitea
description: Gitea edition of Kaola-Workflow for Codex, an adaptive, resumable DAG of role nodes using Gitea issues, pull requests, tea, and repo-backed workflow artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive DAG-of-roles Kaola-Workflow for Gitea projects
interface.longDescription: Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex exposes repo-backed skills and Codex-native agent profiles for project initialization, workflow-init, and adaptive, resumable execution: a planner authors and freezes a task-shaped DAG of role nodes in workflow-plan.md, then the executor runs it node-by-node via the running-set scheduler through research, planning, TDD execution, review, documentation docking, and finalization against Gitea issues and pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Use Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex in this repo.
Resume the current Kaola-Workflow Gitea project.
Run workflow-init for Kaola-Workflow Gitea for Codex.
